title: pyrus × monstrosa
intro: Pyrus × monstrosa, also known as the Monstera deliciosa, is a type of flowering plant native to Central America, but it is not Pyrus × monstrosa which is actually the Crab Apple, a hybrid of Pyrus malus and Pyrus communis.
